nasb.text: See what the land is like, and whether the people who live in it are strong or weak, whether they are few or many.

esv.text: and see what the land is, and whether the people who dwell in it are strong or weak, whether they are few or many,

cnv.text: 看看那地怎樣，住在那裡的人是強是弱，是多是少；

ccb.text: 打探那地方，看看那里的居民是强是弱，是多是少；
